creator: ume@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the patch.
I've committed the changes excluding adding a run dependency to devel/pcsc-lite.
Because, there is a run dependency to security/yubico-piv-tool, and security/yubico-piv-tool has a lib dependency to devel/pcsc-lite.  And, I think yubikey-piv-manager is not depending upon pcsc-lite, directly.
